title: Property Consultant - ATS Infrastructure - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - ATS Infrastructure - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
